response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the performer as Hoshimachi Suisei via visual cues. 2. Identified the song 'Michizure' composed by Ayase based on the concert performance. 3. Used the search tool to find official Japanese lyrics and their English translation for 'Michizure'. 4. Mapped the entire performance as one continuous scene.
response.global_summary: A live concert performance by the VTuber Hoshimachi Suisei, singing her song 'Michizure' (composed by Ayase).

scenes.description: Hoshimachi Suisei performs 'Michizure' live on stage, with various visual effects including floating screens and stage lighting. The audience is visible with glowsticks.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
人の世はいついつまでも
間違い探しばかり
遊び飽きたら終わりよ
鬼が出るか蛇が出るかと
怯えて過ごすばかり
さめざめと一人泣く
こんな旅路をゆくことが
人の条理とでも言うの
憂き身を窶せど
上手く行かずに今夜もまた嘆く
だけどきっと
これはパレードさ
足をひきずろうとも
この滲む痛みと引き換えに
有り余る喜びに出会えるの
これは愉快なパレードさ
私が生きた証ばら撒くから
お気に召したなら共にゆこう
道連れにしてあげるわ
まやかしも化かしも
知らない噂の
一つや二つ
目を瞑ってあげる
でも譲れない大事な想いは
歪むことなくちゃんと伝えたいの
私は此処だよ
此処で生きてるんだよ
貴方と同じ心臓で刻む
鼓動に乗せて進むパレード
どんな景色を見にゆこう
こんな私のことを
信じてくれるならどこまでもゆける
もう一人で泣いたりしないわ
そしていつの日か私と
貴方の旅が終わり迎えた日には
抱え集めてきた荷物をただ
放り投げて笑い合おう
そんな旅路を共にゆこう
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The human world is forever
Just a game of spot the difference
It ends when we're bored of playing
Frightened, just passing the time
Wondering if a demon or snake will appear
I cry all alone, bitter tears
Is this the so-called logic of humanity
That dictates how this journey must go?
Even if I wear myself out in sorrow
I complain again tonight because nothing goes well
But surely,
This is a parade
Even if I have to drag my feet
In exchange for this oozing pain,
I will find overflowing joy
This is a delightful parade
I'll scatter the proof that I lived
If you like it, let's go together
I'll make you my fellow traveler
Even the tricks and deceits
One or two rumors I don't know
I'll close my eyes to them
But my important feelings, which I cannot yield,
I want to convey them properly without distortion
I am right here
I'm living right here
A parade that advances to the beat
Of the heart that ticks the same as yours
What kind of scenery shall we go to see?
If you can believe in
A me like this, we can go anywhere
I won't cry alone anymore
And someday, the day
Our journey together comes to an end
Let's just throw away all the luggage
We've gathered and laugh together
Let's walk that kind of journey together
